about.title: About
about.subtitle: Who am I?
about.bio-condensed: TypeScript Full Stack Developer, I work daily with NestJS on the backend and Angular on the frontend. Passionate about the AI agent ecosystem, I specialized in configuring and integrating Claude Code in team settings…
about.bio-full: TypeScript Full Stack Developer, I work daily with NestJS on the backend and Angular on the frontend. Passionate about the AI agent ecosystem, I specialized in configuring and integrating Claude Code in team settings: designing rules, skills and custom commands to adapt the agent to each project's conventions. Coming from the .NET Core world, I've evolved and adapted to real-world needs. If you're looking for a developer who codes and knows how to leverage AI to deliver better and faster — I'm your dev.

solidaris.title: TypeScript Full Stack Developer (Angular / NestJS)
solidaris.description: Development of an Angular 19 back-office application and a NestJS REST API for managing affiliated members' files at a Belgian health insurance company: contributions, financial assignments, follow-up calls.

frontend.title: Frontend — Angular Back-Office Application
frontend.a0: Built an Angular 19 back-office application (standalone components, lazy-loading) for affiliated member management: multi-criteria search, financial history, contribution tracking
frontend.a1: Designed a 3-layer frontend architecture (modules / shared / core) with Azure AD SSO authentication (MSAL) and role-based access control (RBAC)
frontend.a2: Integrated DB2 mainframe SOAP services (population registry) exposed as REST and internal financial management APIs
frontend.a3: Developed two key business modules: follow-up calls (contribution reminders) and assignments (financial transaction allocation)
frontend.a4: Implemented a statistics dashboard with 7 aggregation endpoints (payments, balances, counts)
frontend.a5: Applied full reactive patterns in RxJS (Observable-only) with generic CRUD services and pagination
frontend.a6: Ensured code quality: strict ESLint (0 warnings), strict TypeScript, conventional commits, Cypress E2E tests, code reviews
frontend.a7: Set up Elastic APM monitoring (Real User Monitoring) and Microsoft Graph API integration

backend.title: Backend — NestJS REST API
backend.a0: Designed and developed a NestJS REST API (TypeScript) for supplementary insurance management (ASCO): contributions, transaction assignments and follow-up calls
backend.a1: Implemented a dual-database architecture (MS SQL + DB2 mainframe) with transactional coordination and compensation mechanism for legacy database failures
backend.a2: Developed the assignments module: full import pipeline, validation, calculation and persistence of financial transactions tracked by processId
backend.a3: Integrated mainframe SOAP services (DB2/UNMS) for population data retrieval and synchronization with the legacy system
backend.a4: Set up a batch scheduler with concurrency management, single-instance execution and error recovery (Umzug, NestJS Schedule)
backend.a5: Secured the API via OAuth2 / Azure AD (MSAL) with JWT guards (RS256), role-based access control and Swagger/OpenID Connect documentation
backend.a6: Established 80% test coverage (Jest, 90+ specs) with AAA pattern, SonarQube reporting and zero ESLint warning policy
backend.a7: Industrialized delivery: versioned migrations, Elastic APM monitoring, Excel/CSV generation and Azure Key Vault for secrets management

nsi.title: .NET Developer (Consultant)
nsi.description: Consultant position: missions carried out at various end clients in the public and industrial sectors.

unipaper.title: Mission 1 — Unipaper / LumiCS
unipaper.a0: Developed a Windows Forms desktop application for managing order processing and instructions for industrial fulfillment machines
unipaper.a1: Handled the complete cycle: business requirements analysis, development, testing and delivery

actiris.title: Mission 2 — Actiris · Single File
actiris.a0: Developed new features on job seeker files: deregistration, document management, certificates
actiris.a1: Wrote and maintained unit tests for each developed feature
actiris.a2: Participated in application refactoring to a service-oriented architecture: removal of MediatR pattern and factories for a more maintainable codebase
actiris.a3: Worked with Oracle functions and an Oracle DB database in a secure API environment

megabyte.title: Full Stack .NET / Angular Developer
megabyte.company-description: Belgian ICT company (50+ employees, offices in Brussels, Antwerp and Louvain-la-Neuve), Microsoft and Sage partner, specialized in custom application development and ERP/CRM solutions.
megabyte.description: Development of custom web applications for international clients. Three major projects in the fields of European chemistry, finance and CRM integration.

cefic.title: Project 1 — Responsible Care Self-Assessment Webtool
cefic.description: HSE self-assessment web platform used by 29,000 chemical companies across Europe and in 70+ countries.
cefic.a0: Developed the CEFIC HSE self-assessment web platform, a voluntary initiative used by 29,000 chemical companies
cefic.a1: Improved reporting and benchmarking features for evaluating health, safety and environmental maturity
cefic.a2: Implemented role and access management (RBAC) to secure sensitive company data
cefic.a3: Added full multilingual support in 18 languages to cover all European member countries

approval.title: Project 2 — MegaApproval
approval.a0: Developed an invoice validation site with approval workflow, PDF generation and authorization management
approval.a1: Created Windows Services for importing accounting documents to various storage types (local, DB, Azure Storage)
approval.a2: Deployed the application on an Azure Cloud environment (App Service, Key Vault, Application Insights)

mailchimp.title: Project 3 — MailChimp to Sage CRM
mailchimp.a0: Developed an integration API retrieving users from MailChimp, SQL database injection and Sage CRM integration via iframe

clusteo.title: .NET Developer
clusteo.company-description: Brussels-based startup (subsidiary of the Perceval group) specialized in multimodal communication platforms and connected health. Official Sidly partner since 2018 for distribution in Belgium-Luxembourg.
clusteo.description: Development of a medical telemonitoring platform communicating with the Sidly-Care smart bracelet for real-time biometric data collection.

youtonomy.title: YOUtonomy Project — Medical Telemonitoring
youtonomy.a0: Developed a Web API communicating with the Sidly-Care smart bracelet to collect real-time biometric data: body temperature, heart rate, oxygen saturation (SpO2), geolocation
youtonomy.a1: Designed a telemonitoring site displaying bracelet data: alarms, configurable alerts, trend charts and personalized threshold management per patient
youtonomy.a2: Developed a medical record module maintaining the complete patient history: illnesses, vaccinations, medical appointments with interactive calendar
youtonomy.a3: Implemented real-time notifications via SignalR for urgent medical alerts

validation.email-invalid: Please enter a valid email address.
